update:
Customer Experience Agent Studio is Generally Available 
 Customer Experience Agent Studio (CX Agent Studio) is now Generally Available
(GA). This unified platform, powered by Gemini, simplifies the creation of
high-quality customer experience agents. This launch includes
agents-building-agents capabilities, featuring "Start with AI," which lets
developers instantly generate a starter agent and tools by providing documents
and high-level instructions. This launch also delivers multimodal excellence,
combining high-fidelity native audio models for natural voice personas with an
out-of-the-box configurable chat messenger that supports rich multimodal
interactions and customizable widgets. CX Agent Studio provides a secure,
enterprise-ready environment to rapidly build, improve, and monitor your AI
workforce. 
 Capabilities: 
 
 Start with AI : Accelerate development by using generative AI to build a
starter agent and associated tools automatically. Simply provide your
existing documentation and a set of instructions, and the platform handles
the initial setup. 
 Configurable chat messenger : Deploy a fully functional, web-based client
"out of the box" that supports text, voice, and multimodal interactions. 
 Rich content widgets : Customize the user experience with configurable
widget templates (including product carousels, order trackers, and quick
actions) to fit your brand needs. 
 Easy deployment : Embed the messenger into your web or mobile application
with a simple HTML snippet generated directly from the  Deploy  tab. 
 Flexible authentication : Secure your agent with built-in support for
both Token Brokers (service account-based) and OAuth 2.0 (user-based)
authentication flows. 
 Native audio models : Create natural, brand-specific voice personas with
high-fidelity audio models (powered by Chirp 3) designed to handle complex
conversations with ease. 
 Enterprise connectors : Seamlessly integrate with essential business
tools using pre-built connectors 
 Enterprise-grade security : Ensure that your data remains secure with
robust identity management and compliance standards.
